summary: Completed e2e testing of App Store readiness features including Settings page navigation, Privacy Policy page, Terms of Service page, and Delete Account 2-step confirmation modal. All backend APIs pass (6/6 tests), frontend UI flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings page correctly implements ACCOUNT, LEGAL, and DANGER ZONE sections
Delete Account has proper 2-step confirmation modal as required by Apple App Store
Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages have comprehensive content with all required sections
Backend DELETE /api/user/delete endpoint properly deletes all user-related data from collections
seed_data_creation: Test user luna@test.com was registered during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: App Store readiness features fully tested. Settings page accessible at /settings with Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and Delete Account features. All navigation and 2-step delete confirmation working correctly. Backend DELETE /api/user/delete endpoint tested with proper auth requirements.

delete_account_modal.step_1: Shows confirmation with list of data to be deleted (Luna Points, tickets, reservations, auctions, crew memberships, activity history)
delete_account_modal.step_2: Shows final confirmation 'Are you absolutely sure?' with 'Delete Forever' button
